title: mentha × verticillata var. diversifolia
intro: Mentha × verticillata var. diversifolia, also known as the pineapple mint, is a hybrid plant of the mint species that is characterized by its unique pineapple-like fragrance and compact growth habit. The medicinal properties of Mentha × verticillata var. diversifolia include its ability to act as a digestive aid, ease nausea, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of consuming pineapple mint include relief from indigestion, improved respiratory function, and reduced inflammation, making it a valuable addition to teas, infusions, and topical applications. Herbal preparations of Mentha × verticillata var. diversifolia include teas, tinctures, and essential oils that can be used to support digestive health, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being.
